hero.title: Dental Surgeon
hero.description: Experience world-class dental care with over 15 years of expertise. Your perfect smile is just one appointment away.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive dental care tailored to your needs
services.notSure: Not Sure Which Treatment You Need?
services.notSureDesc: Book a consultation with Dr. Ahmad to discuss your dental health and find the best treatment plan for you.

implants.name: Dental Implants
implants.fullDescription: State-of-the-art dental implants that look and feel like natural teeth. Our titanium implants provide a permanent foundation for replacement teeth.

whitening.name: Teeth Whitening
whitening.fullDescription: Advanced whitening treatments that safely remove stains and discoloration, giving you a brighter, more confident smile in just one visit.

veneers.name: Porcelain Veneers
veneers.fullDescription: Custom-crafted porcelain veneers that correct chips, gaps, and discoloration. Achieve a Hollywood smile with our premium veneer treatments.

braces.name: Orthodontics & Braces
braces.fullDescription: Traditional braces and modern clear aligners to correct misalignment and create a perfectly straight smile for patients of all ages.

cleaning.name: Deep Cleaning
cleaning.fullDescription: Comprehensive dental cleaning that removes plaque, tartar, and bacteria. Prevent gum disease and maintain optimal oral health.

rootCanal.name: Root Canal Treatment
rootCanal.fullDescription: Modern, virtually painless root canal therapy to save infected teeth. Our gentle approach ensures comfort throughout the procedure.

cta.firstStep: Take the first step towards your perfect smile. Contact us today and let Dr. Ahmad help you achieve the dental health you deserve.

about.title: About Dr. Ahmad
about.subtitle: 15+ years of excellence in dental care
about.bio1: With over 15 years of experience in dental care, Dr. Ahmad Khalil has established himself as one of Beirut's most trusted dental professionals. His commitment to excellence and patient comfort has earned him the loyalty of over 2,000 satisfied patients.
about.bio2: Dr. Khalil specializes in dental implants, cosmetic dentistry, and restorative procedures. He combines state-of-the-art technology with a gentle, patient-centered approach to deliver exceptional results while ensuring your comfort throughout every procedure.

gentle.title: Gentle & Pain-Free Approach
gentle.description: Dr. Ahmad is known for his gentle touch and patient-first philosophy. He takes extra care to ensure every procedure is as comfortable as possible, using the latest pain management techniques.

technology.title: Modern Technology & Equipment
technology.description: Our clinic is equipped with the latest dental technology, including digital X-rays, 3D imaging, and advanced sterilization systems to ensure the best possible outcomes.

transparent.title: Transparent Pricing & Communication
transparent.description: No hidden fees or surprises. Dr. Ahmad believes in clear communication about treatment options, costs, and expected outcomes before any procedure begins.
